name: Feast of the Exaltation of the Holy Cross

sections.title: Antiphon # 85
sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: We should glory in the Cross of our Lord Jesus Christ, in whom is our salvation, life and resurrection, through whom we are saved.

sections.title: Psalm 78 - Do Not Forget the Works of the Lord
sections.author: Francesca LaRosa
sections.snippet: Do not forget the works of the Lord!

sections.author: Curtis Stephan, Mass of St Killian
sections.snippet: We adore you, O Christ, and we bless you, because by your Cross you have redeemed the world.
sections.title: Acclamation Exaltation of the Cross
With Our Eyes on the Cross
sections.author: Sarah Hart/Greg Walton/Vocal arr. by Scott Soper
sections.snippet: Oh, the riches of this life. Oh, the way we have been blessed. Oh, the poverty we own in the things that we posses. You ask us to lay down all the treasure we have stored for the treasure of your kingdom and a narrow road.

sections.author: Christopher Walker
sections.snippet: The Exaltation of the Holy Cross
sections.title: When I am Lifted Up
Freedom In Your Cross
sections.author: Cooper Ray/Laura Ray/Tom Booth/Curtis Stephan/Steve Angrisano/Vocal arr. by Scott Soper
sections.snippet: Deep inside this hardened heart, amid a stormy sea, lies a love that aches for you and longs to be set free, to be set free.

sections.title: Beautiful Is Your Love
sections.author: Josh Blakesley/Sarah Hart/Marc Byrd
sections.snippet: Oh how beautiful is your love for me. Oh what joy is mine in this mystery. I will not fear the dark, here in the presence of your heart. Oh how beautiful is your love.

sections.title: Sweet Redeemer
sections.author: Steve Angrisano/Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: King of Kings, blessed Jesus, hand of mercy, giver of grace; I have come to sing glory, to lay my heart before you in this place.

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.
